code: const DEFAULT_API_BASE_PATH='/api';export function getApiBaseUrl(){var _window$location;const configuredBaseUrl=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL;if(configuredBaseUrl){return configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\/+$/,'');}if(typeof window!=='undefined'&&(_window$location=window.location)!==null&&_window$location!==void 0&&_window$location.origin){return`${window.location.origin}${DEFAULT_API_BASE_PATH}`;}return DEFAULT_API_BASE_PATH;}export function buildApiUrl(path){const normalizedPath=path.startsWith('/')?path:`/${path}`;return`${getApiBaseUrl()}${normalizedPath}`;}
